name: Microsoft 365 & Workspace Management
title_template: Microsoft 365 & Workspace Management {{CITY_NAME}} | Secure Setup
description_template: We set up and manage your company email, Microsoft 365 licenses, and cloud tools so your team can work from anywhere without IT headaches.

name: Cloud Architecture & Azure Transition
title_template: Cloud Architecture {{CITY_NAME}} | Azure & AWS Migration
description_template: We move your company's servers and data off physical hardware and onto secure cloud platforms like Azure or AWS, so you stop paying for hardware you don't need.

name: Endpoint Security
title_template: Endpoint Security {{CITY_NAME}} | Device Protection
description_template: We protect every computer, laptop, and mobile phone in your company from viruses, malware, and hackers — all managed from a single dashboard.

name: Advanced Email Security
title_template: Advanced Email Security {{CITY_NAME}} | Stop Phishing & Spam
description_template: We automatically block fake emails, phishing attacks, ransomware, and spam before they reach your team's inbox.

name: Zero Trust Architecture
title_template: Zero Trust Security {{CITY_NAME}} | Strict Access Control
description_template: We build a security system where no one gets automatic access to anything. Every user and device must prove who they are before reaching company data.

name: Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity
title_template: Disaster Recovery {{CITY_NAME}} | Business Continuity
description_template: We set up automatic backups of your company data so that if something goes wrong — a cyberattack, power failure, or hardware crash — you can get back to work quickly.

name: Continuous Vulnerability Scanning
title_template: Continuous Vulnerability Scanning {{CITY_NAME}} | Always-On Security Checks
description_template: We run automated checks on your IT systems around the clock to find weak spots and security holes before hackers can exploit them.

name: GDPR Compliance Infrastructure
title_template: GDPR Compliance {{CITY_NAME}} | Data Privacy Setup
description_template: We set up the technical systems your company needs to properly store, track, and protect personal data in line with GDPR and local privacy laws.

name: Secure Network & VPN Setup
title_template: Secure Network & VPN Setup {{CITY_NAME}} | Remote Access
description_template: We build a fast, encrypted connection between your team members and company systems, whether they work from the office, home, or another country.

name: 24/7 IT Support & Monitoring
title_template: 24/7 IT Support {{CITY_NAME}} | Helpdesk & Monitoring
description_template: We watch your systems around the clock, fix problems before they grow, and give your team a real support line when something goes wrong.

name: Corporate AI Infrastructure Setup
title_template: Corporate AI Setup {{CITY_NAME}} | Your Company's Own AI Environment
description_template: We build a private AI workspace for your company where your team can use AI tools safely, without your business data leaving your control.

name: On-Premise AI Setup
title_template: On-Premise AI Setup {{CITY_NAME}} | AI That Runs on Your Servers
description_template: We install AI models directly on your own servers so your sensitive business data never leaves your building or gets sent to outside services.

name: AI Data Security Layer
title_template: AI Data Security {{CITY_NAME}} | Stop Data Leaks to AI Tools
description_template: We add a protection layer that stops your employees from accidentally sharing confidential company data with public AI tools like ChatGPT.

name: Agentic AI Development
title_template: AI Automation Agents {{CITY_NAME}} | AI That Does the Work
description_template: We build AI systems that carry out tasks on their own inside your business software — things like updating records, sending follow-ups, or processing orders — without anyone having to do it manually.

name: Smart Factory Optimization
title_template: Smart Factory AI {{CITY_NAME}} | Cut Downtime & Energy Costs
description_template: We connect AI to your production machines and factory data to reduce downtime, cut energy waste, and help your team make better decisions on the factory floor.

name: Sales & Marketing Automation
title_template: Sales & Marketing Automation {{CITY_NAME}} | Close Deals Faster
description_template: We use AI to automatically sort incoming leads, draft proposals, and speed up your sales process so your team can focus on closing instead of admin work.

name: Customer Service Automation
title_template: Customer Service AI {{CITY_NAME}} | Instant Answers for Customers
description_template: We build AI chat and voice assistants that answer common customer questions instantly, 24/7, so your team only handles the cases that really need a human.

name: Breaking Down Data Silos
title_template: Data Automation {{CITY_NAME}} | Connect Your Scattered Information
description_template: We use AI to automatically pull data from emails, PDFs, and spreadsheets and push it into your business software, so nothing falls through the cracks.

name: Operational Load Reduction
title_template: AI Workload Reduction {{CITY_NAME}} | Less Repetitive Work for Your Team
description_template: We identify the most time-consuming repetitive tasks in your business and automate them with AI, freeing up your team to focus on work that actually matters.

name: Custom ERP/CRM Integrations
title_template: ERP & CRM Integration {{CITY_NAME}} | Connect Your Business Tools
description_template: We connect your separate business tools — like your accounting software, CRM, and inventory system — so data flows between them automatically instead of being re-entered by hand.

name: Digital Engineering Software
title_template: Engineering Software {{CITY_NAME}} | Custom R&D Tools
description_template: We build custom software for engineering and R&D teams that need calculation tools, simulation apps, or design software built specifically for their work.

name: B2B Dealer & Customer Portals
title_template: Dealer & Customer Portal {{CITY_NAME}} | Self-Service for Your Clients
description_template: We build a private online portal where your dealers and customers can place orders, check stock, submit service requests, and manage their account without calling your team.

name: Human-in-the-Loop AI Testing
title_template: AI-Assisted QA Testing {{CITY_NAME}} | Fast Checks, Human Review
description_template: We combine AI-powered automated testing with human review to check your data, content, or digital products quickly and catch mistakes that machines miss.

name: Legacy System Modernization
title_template: Legacy System Upgrade {{CITY_NAME}} | Replace Old Software Without Data Loss
description_template: We replace outdated or unsupported software with a modern system your team can actually use, without losing any of your existing data.

name: Enterprise BI & Dashboards
title_template: Reporting Dashboards {{CITY_NAME}} | See Your Business in Real Time
description_template: We build custom dashboards that show your sales, production, and financial data in real time on a single screen, so managers can make decisions fast.

name: Internal Operational Applications
title_template: Internal Apps {{CITY_NAME}} | Tools Built for Your Team
description_template: We build web and mobile apps for your staff — whether they're in the field, at a warehouse, or in the office — that match how they actually work.

name: Corporate Website Development
title_template: Corporate Website {{CITY_NAME}} | Modern Site That Converts
description_template: We build fast, professional corporate websites designed to make a strong first impression, explain what you do, and turn visitors into enquiries.

name: MVP Development
title_template: MVP Development {{CITY_NAME}} | Test Your Idea Before You Scale
description_template: We build a working, stripped-down version of your product idea in a few weeks so you can test it with real users before investing in the full build.

name: Custom Data Architecture & Database Design
title_template: Database Design {{CITY_NAME}} | Clean Data Structure for Your Business
description_template: We organize and structure your company data properly so it's accurate, easy to access, and ready to be used by AI tools or reporting systems in the future.
